title: CAMPS - 211info
text: LIBRARY, RECREATION, AND CULTURAL SERVICES CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers youth enrichment programs, including recreation day camps during winter, spring, and summer sessions. Depending on the camp, enrollment may be determined by lottery or available on a first-come, first-served basis. 100 W 10th Avenue Suite 321 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Ages 3-17 Hours: Varies by camp. Summer camp registration/lottery starts mid-April. (541) 682-5333 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-5333 Español (541) 682-6891 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by camp. Scholarships may be available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Eugene SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Services: Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CITY OF EUGENE PARKS AND RECREATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIBRARY, RECREATION, AND CULTURAL SERVICES
